title: Maximum Realism
body:
🎯 Maximum Realism

Step into Minecraft like never before — where the laws of nature don’t bend, they rule.
Maximum Realism transforms the game into a grounded, immersive survival experience that pushes the limits of believability. From lifelike physics and natural terrain generation to nuanced soundscapes and detailed behavior systems, every aspect of gameplay is fine-tuned for a sense of weight, danger, and presence. Whether you're dodging collapsing debris, casting lines into realistic waters, or navigating terrain that feels sculpted by nature, this modpack grounds you in a world that reacts, breathes, and challenges you to adapt.

Built on Fabric 1.19 for lightweight performance and mod compatibility, Maximum Realism delivers a new level of environmental intensity — without losing the soul of Minecraft.
